query:
UPDATE projects p
SET p.discoveryStatus = 'send_ready_contact'
WHERE p.id IN (120240, 1200018, 1200067, 1260002, 120181, 1200063, 60024, 720027, 1200045, 1260012)
  AND p.priority = 'hot' AND p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.discoveryStatus = 'discovery_queued';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute
